Frozen-IR build-time embed; the .generated.json is drift-gated by manifest:ir:embed:check. Documented perf optimization (constitution §4a API transport glue).

Manifest MCP server: tenant/admin introspection of IR, OpenAPI, and the routes manifest is its defined purpose (constitution §4a/§10 derived surface), so it reads those raw artifacts directly.
